title: digitaria granularis
intro: Digitaria granularis, also known as finger grass, is a type of grass native to Africa and Asia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. In traditional medicine, Digitaria granularis is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste, and can be used to treat a range of ailments.
